content.en:
"It's not easy to fuse my Ninefold Life Dao Flower with the Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, in order to break through the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm, he had to fuse.

Compared to other Eightfold Origin Ancestor Peak Dao Ancestors, he possessed an immeasurable Dao domain, so he could speed up the fusion process, and he would not spend endless years to get through this bottleneck like other Eightfold Origin Ancestor peak powerhouses.

Truncate the Xuanlou.

Ye Tian began to practice in retreat, and two flowers appeared on his body, one was the Ninefold Life Dao Flower, and the other was the Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower.

The two Dao flowers began to slowly merge in the void, and the process was too slow.

Airplanes!!!!

The Infinite Dao Domain was condensed, and then the two Dao Flowers were forcibly fused, so that the speed of fusion was accelerated many times at once.

Such fusion can hardly be aided by resources, at least not yet, that have been found to speed up the process.

"At the very least, it will take more than three hundred trillion years of the Origin Domain Era before I can hope to fuse the two Dao flowers into more than three percent!"

Ye Tian estimated.

All along, his cultivation speed has been fast, but this time it took so long to break a shackle.

However, his speed was already terrifying, and it would be too difficult to accelerate his cultivation again!

"More than three hundred trillion years of the Origin Domain Era, this is too time-consuming!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

So, he wanted to consult the other Dao Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building to see if they had the experience of quickly breaking through to a half-step Ninefold Primordial Ancestor.

Ye Tian first consulted the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor, but the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor also relied on the infinite years to slowly survive this shackle.

After becoming a half-step ninefold ancestor, the speed of fusing the two Dao flowers will soar.

But before that, there really isn't much to do.

Subsequently, he also consulted some other half-step ninefold ancestors, but there was no good way.

this day.

Ye Tian consulted the Strongest Ninefold Ancestor who was guarding the Xuanlou, Dongchen Dao Ancestor, and originally didn't expect the other party to give an answer, but Dongchen Dao Ancestor really answered, and gave a suggestion that seemed unlikely.

"Self-created Dao Flower Fusion Technique!"

Every Dao Ancestor's Life Dao Flower and Yuan Dao Dao Flower are different, especially the Yuan Dao Dao Flower is completely different, after all, their own Yuan Dao is different!

Therefore, the process of fusion naturally cannot be exactly the same, even if a powerhouse like Dongchen Dao Ancestor has several Dao Flower Fusion Techniques, it is not suitable for Ye Tian.

But if Ye Tian created the Dao Flower Fusion Technique, he could speed up the fusion process.

However, it was simply too difficult to create their own Dao Flower Fusion Technique, even if those Eightfold Origin Ancestor Peak Dao Ancestors wanted to try, they might have only needed so much time to break through, but they wasted even more time, and there was still no way to create it.

Moreover, there may be certain risks in creating this Dao Flower Fusion Technique, such as damaging one's own Dao Flower, then it may be necessary to pay a greater price to repair one's Dao Flower, which is a bit more than worth the loss.

"I'll try my own Dao Flower Fusion Technique first, and give up if there is really no hope of success!"

Ye Tian decided.

So, he began to boldly try his own Dao Flower Fusion Technique.

Compared with other Eightfold Origin Ancestor Peak Dao Ancestors, his advantage is that he dares to try and study casually, and he is not afraid of damaging his own Dao Flower, and it is a big deal to re-replicate a body.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to study wildly.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian's Life Dao Flower and Yuan Dao Flower to have problems.

However, he re-replicated the replica body and continued to study it like this.

Under Ye Tian's almost crazy research, he still researched something, so he saw the hope of the success of his self-created Dao Flower Fusion Technique.

As a result, Ye Tian spent more than 100 billion years of the Origin Domain Era, and finally succeeded in creating a Dao Flower Fusion Technique.

This Dao Flower Fusion Technique was named the Nine Poles Fusion Technique by Ye Tian, and after Ye Tian's attempt, the Nine Poles Fusion Technique could accelerate the fusion speed of the Life Dao Flower and the Yuan Dao Flower by 30,000 times.

Originally, Ye Tian needed three hundred billion years of the Origin Domain Era to have any hope of fusing the Ninefold Life Dao Flower and the Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower to more than three percent, and break through to a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor.

But now, with the help of the Nine Extremes Fusion Technique, he only needed ten billion Origin Domain Era years to successfully fuse the Nine Folds Life Dao Flower and the Nine Elements Dao Flower to more than three percent.

"It's worthy of the Dao Flower Fusion Technique, it can actually speed up my cultivation speed by 30,000 times!!!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Immediately, he used the Nine Extremes Fusion Technique to cooperate with the cultivation of the Infinite Dao Domain to accelerate the fusion of his Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower and the Ninefold Life Dao Flower.

Before you know it, the 10 billion Primordial Era years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower and Ninefold Life Dao Flower successfully fused to the Sancheng realm.

And at this time, Ye Tian obviously sensed a shackle, which was the shackle that prevented him from becoming a half-step ninefold ancestor.

Now, it seems that he only needs to impact to break this shackle.

Immediately, Ye Tian struck this shackle.

After fusing the Triple Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower and the Ninefold Life Dao Flower, with the help of the power of the two Dao Flowers, he easily shattered the shackles.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation broke through and reached the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm.

Endless energy poured into Ye Tian's body, and it took him a long time to truly stabilize his realm.

......

Truncate the Xuanlou.

Dongchen Dao Ancestor sensed Ye Tian's breakthrough and was immediately a little surprised.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, this little guy has broken through to the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, even if he has condensed the Infinite Dao Domain, but the speed of this breakthrough is too fast!"

Dongchen Dao Ancestor thought that Ye Tian had asked him how to quickly fuse the Life Dao Flower and the Yuan Dao Dao Flower before, and he casually said a Dao Flower Fusion Technique.

Could it be that the Endless Dao Ancestor created his own Dao Flower Fusion Technique?

Only this possibility would allow Ye Tian to break through to a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor so quickly!

"If this is really the case, the speed at which the Endless Dao Ancestor passes through the stage of the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor will be very fast, I'm afraid that it won't take too many years, and he will become the Ninefold Origin Ancestor!"

Dongchen Daozu looked forward to it.

......

Truncate the source sea.

Ye Tian copied the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor Realm's copied body here, replacing the original copied body.

In this way, Ye Tian was cutting off Yuan Hai's copy body was a half-step Ninefold Ancestor.

Moreover, he has just broken through, and the realm has not yet stabilized, so he can completely use the blue crystal to stabilize the realm and improve his cultivation!

He could even use those blue crystals to raise his cultivation to the limit of a half-step Ninefold Ancestor, saving him countless penances.
